record.field:
action = env['portfolio.fund'].sync_all_from_master() # Notify user of result synced_count = action.get('synced_count', 0) total = action.get('total_certificates', 0)
action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.client', 'tag': 'display_notification', 'params': { 'title': 'Sync Completed', 'message': 'Successfully synced %s funds from %s master certificates.' % (synced_count, total), 'type': 'success', 'sticky': False, } }
